Record.Property:
* VC LOGS * ^1_2 01/11/13 11:15:58 Batch 16448_40606 INIT pd0sp-wag018 Sephora_EDW_PRD hmadatanapalli EDW_Full_Back_Up_2013_Jan_11 ^1_1 10/30/12 09:19:42 Batch 16375_33603 INIT pd0sp-wag018 Sephora_EDW_PRD rkhan Inv_Periodic_Opt ^1_1 10/24/12 16:08:43 Batch 16369_58130 PROMOTE localhost Sephora_EDW_PRD hmadatanapalli op ^1_1 10/24/12 16:05:31 Batch 16369_57935 INIT pd0sp-wag011 Sephora_EDW_DEV hmadatanapalli tf ^1_1 06/02/10 09:33:24 Batch 15494_34462 INIT pd0sp-wag018 Sephora_EDW_PRD jbryant Sephora_EDW_PRD_20100602
Change Log:
Version Date Author Jira-Task Description -------------------- --------------------- -------------------------------------- ----------------------------- --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 2018.2 2018-02-05 Dmytro Ilkov ILLUPH-100893 hardcoded Dotcom locations were removed 2025.13 2025-06-25 Dmitry Myshkovets RE-5005 add Split Logic for Purchase Order Values for Dual Inventory locations 2025.14 2025-06-30 Dmitry Myshkovets RE-5050 Replace PURCHASE_ORDER Ship_To_Location_SK with Distribution_Location_SK 2025.18 2025-08-28 Dmitry Myshkovets RE-5383 Add Ending_Invetory_Fin columns For finance reporting

truncate table STG_INVENTORY_PERIODIC_DAILY
insert into STG_INVENTORY_PERIODIC_DAILY(Date_SK, Location_SK, Product_SK, Available_Sales_Units, Damaged_RTV_Units, Ending_Inventory_Cost, Ending_Inventory_Retail, Ending_Inventory_Units, In_Transit_Quantity, Lost_Found_Units, Net_Vendor_Cost, On_Order_Units, On_Order_Cost,On_Order_Cost_Retail, Reserve_Units_Merchandise, Reserve_Units_Picking, Sell_Unit_Cost, Sell_Unit_Retail, Store_Order_Quantity, Transfer_Quantity, Create_Date, Ending_Inventory_Cost_Fin, Ending_Inventory_Retail_Fin, Ending_Inventory_Units_Fin) select D.Date_SK, L.Location_SK, P.Product_SK, (case when isnull(l_dc.Is_Inv,'n/a')='Y' and isnull(l_dc.Country,'n/a')='US' and isnull(Is_Sales,'n/a')='N' and isnull(l_dc.Is_DmgDC,'n/a')='N' Then s.SSOHU - (s.SSDMG + s.SSLOST + s.SSROHM + s.SSROHP) Else s.SSOHU - (s.SSDMG + s.SSLOST) end) as Available_Sales_Units, S.SSDMG Damaged_RTV_Units, S.SSECD Ending_Inventory_Cost, S.SSOHU * S.SSSUR Ending_Inventory_Retail, S.SSOHU Ending_Inventory_Units, ISNULL(w08.QTY,0) as In_Transit_Quantity, S.SSLOST Lost_Found_Units, isNull(s.SSOHU,0) * ( (1 - (isNull((VN.DSC1 + VN.DSC2 + VN.DSC3),0)/100)) * ISNull(VN.CUC,0)) AS Net_Vendor_Cost, PO.OOU AS On_Order_Units, PO.On_Order_Cost, PO.On_Order_Cost_Retail, S.SSROHM Reserve_Units_Merchandise, S.SSROHP Reserve_Units_Picking, VN.CUC AS Sell_Unit_Cost, S.SSSUR Sell_Unit_Retail, IsNull(WHCTRL.QOSU,0) AS Store_Order_Quantity, ISNULL(wXX.QTY,0) AS Transfer_Quantity, GETDATE() CREATE_DATE, S.SSECD Ending_Inventory_Cost_Fin, S.SSOHU * S.SSSUR Ending_Inventory_Retail_Fin, S.SSOHU Ending_Inventory_Units_Fin from Sephora_EDW_replication.dbo.SKULOC s -- 6872564 inner join Sephora_EDW.dbo.location l on l.Location_Number = s.SSSTRE inner join Sephora_EDW.dbo.product p on p.SKU_Number = s.SSSKU inner join Sephora_EDW.dbo.date d on d.Short_Date = '#pDate#' -- set it to variable left outer join sephora_edw.dbo.location_dc l_dc on l.location_sk = l_dc.location_sk LEFT OUTER join (SELECT WZCO, WZSTRE, WZSKU, WZTYPE, SUM(isnull(WZSQTY,0)) QTY FROM Sephora_EDW_replication.dbo.WHINTR WHERE WZSTAT = '2' and WZTYPE = '08' GROUP BY WZCO, WZSTRE, WZSKU,WZTYPE) AS w08 on w08.WZCO= SSCO AND w08.WZSTRE = SSSTRE AND w08.WZSKU = SSSKU LEFT OUTER join (SELECT WZCO, WZSTRE, WZSKU, WZTYPE, SUM(isnull(WZSQTY,0)) QTY FROM Sephora_EDW_replication.dbo.WHINTR WHERE WZSTAT = '2' and WZTYPE <> '08' GROUP BY WZCO, WZSTRE, WZSKU,WZTYPE) AS wXX on wXX.WZCO= SSCO AND wXX.WZSTRE = SSSTRE AND wXX.WZSKU = SSSKU LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT WD.WDCO, WD.WDSTRE, WD.WDSKU, SUM(isnull(WD.WDQOSU,0)) QOSU FROM Sephora_EDW_replication.dbo.WHDET WD LEFT OUTER JOIN Sephora_EDW_replication.dbo.WHCTL WC ON WD.WDCO = WC.WCCO AND WD.WDSTRE = WC.WCSTRE AND WD.WDINV = WC.WCINV WHERE WC.WCSTAT < 5 GROUP BY WD.WDCO, WD.WDSTRE, WD.WDSKU) WHCTRL on WHCTRL.WDCO= SSCO AND WHCTRL.WDSTRE = SSSTRE AND WHCTRL.WDSKU = SSSKU LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT SL.SSCO, SL.SSSKU, SL.SSSTRE, SUM(isnull(SK.SRCUC,0)) CUC, SUM(isnull(VB.VBDSC1,0)) DSC1, SUM(isnull(VB.VBDSC2,0)) DSC2, SUM(isnull(VB.VBDSC3,0)) DSC3 FROM Sephora_EDW_replication.dbo.SKULOC SL LEFT OUTER JOIN Sephora_EDW_replication.dbo.SKURT SK ON SL.SSCO = SK.SRCO AND SL.SSSKU = SK.SRSKU LEFT OUTER JOIN Sephora_EDW_replication.dbo.VNBUYR VB ON SK.SRCO = VB.VBCO AND SK.SRBUY = VB.VBBUY AND SK.SRVN = VB.VBVN GROUP BY SL.SSCO, SL.SSSKU, SL.SSSTRE) VN ON VN.SSCO = S.SSCO AND VN.SSSKU = S.SSSKU AND VN.SSSTRE = S.SSSTRE LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT Product_SK,Distribution_Location_SK,SUM(isnull(On_Order_Units,0)) OOU, SUM(isnull(On_Order_Cost,0)) as On_Order_Cost, SUM(isnull(On_Order_Cost_Retail,0)) AS On_Order_Cost_Retail FROM SEPHORA_EDW.DBO.PURCHASE_ORDER WHERE Approval_Code = 3 and Distribution_Location_SK not in (select location_sk from Sephora_EDW..location_dc where is_dotcom = 'Y' and is_retail = 'Y' union all select Sales_Location_SK from Sephora_EDW..location_dc where is_dotcom = 'Y' and is_retail = 'Y' ) GROUP BY Product_SK,Distribution_Location_SK) AS PO ON PO.Product_SK = P.Product_SK AND PO.Distribution_Location_SK = L.Location_SK
-- Updating Split Purchase Order Values for Dual-Inventory locations --RE-5005 Update STG Set stg.On_Order_Units =POX.On_Order_Units, stg.On_Order_Cost =POX.On_Order_Cost, stg.On_Order_Cost_Retail =POX.On_Order_Cost_Retail From Sephora_EDW.dbo.STG_INVENTORY_PERIODIC_DAILY stg join (Select distinct (case when p_ex.PREXCHL='D' then ldc.Sales_Location_SK else ldc.Location_sk end )as Location_sk, po.product_SK, SUM(isnull(On_Order_Units,0)) as On_Order_Units, SUM(isnull(On_Order_Cost,0)) as On_Order_Cost, SUM(isnull(On_Order_Cost_Retail,0)) as On_Order_Cost_Retail from Sephora_EDW.dbo.PURCHASE_ORDER PO Join Sephora_EDW_Replication.dbo.porootex P_EX on po.Purchase_Order=p_ex.PREXPO Join Sephora_EDW..LOCATION_dc LDC on po.Distribution_Location_SK= ldc.Location_sk where po.Distribution_Location_SK in (select location_sk from Sephora_EDW..location_dc where is_dotcom = 'Y' and is_retail = 'Y' union all select Sales_Location_SK from Sephora_EDW..location_dc where is_dotcom = 'Y' and is_retail = 'Y' ) and Approval_Code = 3 Group by po.product_SK, (case when p_ex.PREXCHL='D' then ldc.Sales_Location_SK else ldc.Location_sk end ) )AS POx ON POx.Product_SK = stg.Product_SK AND POx.Location_SK = stg.Location_SK
--Update Begin Inv with Ending Inv from previous day DECLARE @intdate_sk int SELECT @intdate_sk=max(date_sk) FROM STG_INVENTORY_PERIODIC_DAILY
UPDATE a SET a.Begin_Inventory_Cost=b.Ending_Inventory_Cost, a.Begin_Inventory_Retail=b.Ending_Inventory_Retail, a.Begin_Inventory_Units=b.Ending_Inventory_Units --select b.Date_SK,b.Location_SK,b.Product_SK,b.Ending_Inventory_Cost,b.Ending_Inventory_Retail,b.Ending_Inventory_Units FROM sephora_edw.dbo.STG_INVENTORY_PERIODIC_DAILY a, sephora_edw.dbo.INVENTORY_PERIODIC_DAILY_GT_042015 b WHERE b.Date_SK =@intdate_sk -1 and a.Date_SK = @intdate_sk and a.Location_SK=b.Location_SK and a.Product_SK=b.Product_SK
update s set s.SKU_Behavior_Code= r.SKU_Behavior_Code, s.DC_SKU_Behavior_Code=r.DC_SKU_Behavior_Code, s.E3_Source_Code= r.E3_Source_Code from STG_INVENTORY_PERIODIC_DAILY s inner join mini_raq2 r on r.Location_SK = s.Location_SK and r.Product_SK = s.Product_SK
update iv set SKU_Behavior_Code = SLTATRCD from STG_INVENTORY_PERIODIC_DAILY iv join location l on l.location_sk = iv.location_sk join product p on p.Product_SK = iv.Product_SK join Sephora_EDW_Replication.dbo.skulocat s on s.SLTSKU = p.SKU_Number and s.SLTSTRE = l.Location_number where SLTCO = 30 and SLTATRCD <> SKU_Behavior_Code
INSERT INTO INVENTORY_PERIODIC_DAILY_GT_042015 (Date_SK, Location_SK, Product_SK, Available_Sales_Units, Damaged_RTV_Units, Ending_Inventory_Cost, Ending_Inventory_Retail, Ending_Inventory_Units, In_Transit_Quantity, Lost_Found_Units, Net_Vendor_Cost, On_Order_Units, Reserve_Units_Merchandise, Reserve_Units_Picking, Sell_Unit_Retail, Store_Order_Quantity, Transfer_Quantity, Active_Store_Flag, Store_With_Inv_Flag, Store_With_Sales_Flag, Create_Date, On_Order_Cost, On_Order_Cost_Retail, Begin_Inventory_Cost, Begin_Inventory_Retail, Begin_Inventory_Units, Sell_Unit_Cost, In_Transit_Inventory_Cost, In_Transit_Inventory_Retail,SKU_Behavior_Code,DC_SKU_Behavior_Code,E3_Source_Code,Ending_Inventory_Cost_Fin, Ending_Inventory_Retail_Fin, Ending_Inventory_Units_Fin) SELECT Date_SK, Location_SK, Product_SK, Available_Sales_Units, Damaged_RTV_Units, Ending_Inventory_Cost, Ending_Inventory_Retail, Ending_Inventory_Units, In_Transit_Quantity, Lost_Found_Units, Net_Vendor_Cost, On_Order_Units, Reserve_Units_Merchandise, Reserve_Units_Picking, Sell_Unit_Retail, Store_Order_Quantity, Transfer_Quantity, Active_Store_Flag, Store_With_Inv_Flag, Store_With_Sales_Flag, Create_Date, On_Order_Cost, On_Order_Cost_Retail, Begin_Inventory_Cost, Begin_Inventory_Retail, Begin_Inventory_Units, Sell_Unit_Cost, In_Transit_Inventory_Cost, In_Transit_Inventory_Retail,SKU_Behavior_Code,DC_SKU_Behavior_Code,E3_Source_Code,Ending_Inventory_Cost_Fin, Ending_Inventory_Retail_Fin, Ending_Inventory_Units_Fin FROM STG_INVENTORY_PERIODIC_DAILY s where not exists (select 1 from INVENTORY_PERIODIC_DAILY_GT_042015 i where i.date_sk = @intdate_sk and i.Date_SK=s.date_sk and i.Location_SK=s.Location_SK and i.Product_SK=s.Product_SK) ; exec usp_Update_Inv_Periodic; exec usp_Populate_Stock_Continuity;
Migration: 2015-09-09 ODBC ";;" deleted on sql statment

* VC LOGS * ^1_2 01/11/13 11:15:58 Batch 16448_40606 INIT pd0sp-wag018 Sephora_EDW_PRD hmadatanapalli EDW_Full_Back_Up_2013_Jan_11 ^1_1 10/30/12 09:19:42 Batch 16375_33603 INIT pd0sp-wag018 Sephora_EDW_PRD rkhan Inv_Periodic_Opt ^1_1 10/24/12 16:08:43 Batch 16369_58130 PROMOTE localhost Sephora_EDW_PRD hmadatanapalli op ^1_1 10/24/12 16:05:31 Batch 16369_57935 INIT pd0sp-wag011 Sephora_EDW_DEV hmadatanapalli tf ^1_1 06/02/10 09:33:24 Batch 15494_34462 INIT pd0sp-wag018 Sephora_EDW_PRD jbryant Sephora_EDW_PRD_20100602
Change Log:
Version Date Author Jira-Task Description -------------------- --------------------- -------------------------------------- ----------------------------- --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 2025.18 2025-08-28 Dmitry Myshkovets RE-5383 Add Ending_Invetory_Fin columns For finance reporting

--Update Begin Inv with Ending Inv from previous day DECLARE @intdate_sk int SELECT @intdate_sk=max(date_sk) FROM STG_INVENTORY_PERIODIC_DAILY
-- WEEKLY DECLARE @Wkly_date_sk int
SELECT @Wkly_date_sk= (select date_sk from date where short_date =(select week_begin_date-1 FROM date where short_date = convert(varchar(10),getdate(),120)) )
UPDATE a SET a.Begin_Inventory_Cost_Wkly=b.Ending_Inventory_Cost, a.Begin_Inventory_Retail_Wkly=b.Ending_Inventory_Retail, a.Begin_Inventory_Units_Wkly=b.Ending_Inventory_Units FROM sephora_edw.dbo.STG_INVENTORY_PERIODIC_DAILY a, sephora_edw.dbo.STG_INVENTORY_PERIODIC_WEEKLY_SS b WHERE a.Date_SK = @intdate_sk -- this is not required as there is always one days data and a.Location_SK=b.Location_SK and a.Product_SK=b.Product_SK
INSERT INTO INVENTORY_PERIODIC_WEEKLY_GT_042015 (Date_SK, Location_SK, Product_SK, Available_Sales_Units, Damaged_RTV_Units, Ending_Inventory_Cost, Ending_Inventory_Retail, Ending_Inventory_Units, In_Transit_Quantity, Lost_Found_Units, Net_Vendor_Cost, On_Order_Units, Reserve_Units_Merchandise, Reserve_Units_Picking, Sell_Unit_Retail, Store_Order_Quantity, Transfer_Quantity, Active_Store_Flag, Store_With_Inv_Flag, Store_With_Sales_Flag, Create_Date, On_Order_Cost, On_Order_Cost_Retail, Begin_Inventory_Cost, Begin_Inventory_Retail, Begin_Inventory_Units, Sell_Unit_Cost, In_Transit_Inventory_Cost, In_Transit_Inventory_Retail, Ending_Inventory_Cost_Fin, Ending_Inventory_Retail_Fin, Ending_Inventory_Units_Fin) SELECT Date_SK, Location_SK, Product_SK, Available_Sales_Units, Damaged_RTV_Units, Ending_Inventory_Cost, Ending_Inventory_Retail, Ending_Inventory_Units, In_Transit_Quantity, Lost_Found_Units, Net_Vendor_Cost, On_Order_Units, Reserve_Units_Merchandise, Reserve_Units_Picking, Sell_Unit_Retail, Store_Order_Quantity, Transfer_Quantity, Active_Store_Flag, Store_With_Inv_Flag, Store_With_Sales_Flag, Create_Date, On_Order_Cost, On_Order_Cost_Retail, Begin_Inventory_Cost_Wkly, Begin_Inventory_Retail_Wkly, Begin_Inventory_Units_Wkly, Sell_Unit_Cost, In_Transit_Inventory_Cost, In_Transit_Inventory_Retail,Ending_Inventory_Cost_Fin, Ending_Inventory_Retail_Fin, Ending_Inventory_Units_Fin FROM STG_INVENTORY_PERIODIC_DAILY s where not exists (select 1 from INVENTORY_PERIODIC_WEEKLY_GT_042015 i where i.date_sk = @intdate_sk and i.Date_SK=s.date_sk and i.Location_SK=s.Location_SK and i.Product_SK=s.Product_SK);;
Migration: 2015-09-09 ODBC ";;" deleted on sql statment
